2605.27361.title: Natural Language Query to Configuration for Retrieval Agents
2605.27361.paper_summary: Modern retrieval agents expose many configuration choices -- LLM, retriever, number of documents, number of hops, and synthesis strategy -- each shaping both answer quality and serving cost. Today, these pipelines are typically hand-tuned once per workload, leaving substantial per-query optimization untapped. We formulate the problem: given a natural-language query and either an accuracy or a budget target, select from a predefined pipeline catalog the configuration that minimizes cost or maximizes accuracy at inference time. We propose **BRANE**, which uses an LLM to convert each query into workload-specific characteristics, then trains a lightweight per-configuration predictor that estimates whether the pipeline will answer the query correctly. At inference time, **BRANE** selects the configuration that maximizes predicted correctness penalized by cost, exposing a tunable cost-quality tradeoff without retraining. Across MuSiQue, BrowseComp-Plus, and FinanceBench, **BRANE** consistently pushes the cost-quality Pareto frontier, matches the best fixed configuration's accuracy at up to 89% lower cost, and outperforms LLM-routing, rule-based, and fine-tuned Qwen3-4B baselines. These results show that per-query configuration of the full retrieval pipeline is a practical alternative to static workload-level tuning.
2605.27361.paper_summary_zh: 現代檢索代理暴露了許多配置選擇——LLM、檢索器、文件數量、跳躍數量和合成策略——每一項都影響著答案質量和服務成本。今天，這些管道通常在每個工作負載上進行一次手動調整，留下了大量的每查詢優化未被利用。我們將問題公式化：給定一個自然語言查詢以及準確性或預算目標，從預定義的管道目錄中選擇最小化成本或最大化準確性的配置。在此，我們提出**BRANE**，它使用LLM將每個查詢轉換為特定工作負載的特徵，然後訓練一個輕量級的每個配置預測器，估計該管道是否能正確回答查詢。在推理時，**BRANE**選擇最大化預測正確性且考慮成本的配置，暴露出可調整的成本-質量權衡，而無需重新訓練。在MuSiQue、BrowseComp-Plus和FinanceBench中，**BRANE**始終推進成本-質量的Pareto邊界，以高達89%更低的成本匹配最佳固定配置的準確性，並超越LLM路由、基於規則的和微調的Qwen3-4B基準。這些結果表明，對整個檢索管道的每查詢配置是一種靜態工作負載級調整的實用替代方案。
2605.27361.author: Melissa Z. Pan et.al.
2605.27361.authors: Melissa Z. Pan, Negar Arabzadeh, Mathew Jacob, Fiodar Kazhamiaka, Esha Choukse, Matei Zaharia
